exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group presentation(cloud)[Presentation Layer]
    group application(cloud)[Application Layer]
    group data(cloud)[Data Layer]
    group analytics(cloud)[Analytics Layer]
    group orchestration(cloud)[Orchestration Layer]

    service s3(aws:s3)[AWS S3] in data
    service functions(azure:functions)[Azure Functions] in application
    service bigquery(gcp:bigquery)[GCP BigQuery] in analytics
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Kubernetes] in orchestration

    service app(azure:app-service)[App Service] in application
    service gke(gcp:gke)[GKE Cluster] in orchestration
    service aks(azure:aks)[AKS Cluster] in orchestration
    service eks(aws:eks)[EKS Cluster] in orchestration

    presentation:R -- L:app
    app:R -- L:functions
    functions:R -- L:s3
    functions:R -- L:bigquery
    bigquery:B -- T:k8s
    k8s:R -- L:gke
    k8s:R -- L:aks
    k8s:R -- L:eks
    gke:R -- L:s3
    aks:R -- L:s3
    eks:R -- L:s3
